description.en: Return local time as an aware datetime object. If called without arguments, return current time. Otherwise dt argument should be a datetime instance, and it is converted to the local time zone according to the system time zone database. If dt is naive (that is, dt.tzinfo is None), it is assumed to be in local time. Added in version 3.3. Deprecated since version 3.12, removed in version 3.14: The isdst parameter.
